holdItems.name: Black Belt
holdItems.desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This belt helps with focus and boosts the power of the holder's Fighting-type moves.

holdItems.name: Black Glasses
holdItems.desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a pair of shady- looking glasses that boost the power of the holder's Dark-type moves.

holdItems.name: Bright Powder
holdItems.desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This glittery powder casts a tricky glare that lowers the accuracy of opposing Pokémon's moves.

holdItems.name: Charcoal
holdItems.desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a combustible fuel that boosts the power of the holder's Fire-type moves.

holdItems.name: Choice Scarf
holdItems.desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This curious scarf boosts the holder's Speed stat but only allows the use of a single move.

holdItems.name: Dragon Fang
holdItems.desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This hard, sharp fang boosts the power of the holder's Dragon-type moves.

holdItems.name: Fairy Feather
holdItems.desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This feather, which gleams faintly when hit by light, boosts the power of the holder's Fairy-type moves.

holdItems.name: Focus Band
holdItems.desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. When the holder is hit with a move that should knock it out, it may be able to endure with 1 HP.

holdItems.name: Focus Sash
holdItems.desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. If the holder has full HP and it is hit with a move that should knock it out, it will endure with 1 HP—but only once.

holdItems.name: Hard Stone
holdItems.desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a durable stone that boosts the power of the holder's Rock-type moves.

holdItems.name: King's Rock
holdItems.desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It may cause the target to flinch whenever the holder successfully inflicts damage on them with an attack.

holdItems.name: Leftovers
holdItems.desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It slowly but steadily restores the holder's HP.

holdItems.name: Light Ball
holdItems.desc: An item to be held by Pikachu. It's a mysterious orb that boosts Pikachu's Attack and Sp. Atk stats.

holdItems.name: Magnet
holdItems.desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a powerful magnet that boosts the power of the holder's Electric-type moves.

holdItems.name: Mental Herb
holdItems.desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. The holder will be able to shake off move-binding effects to move freely— but only once.

holdItems.name: Metal Coat
holdItems.desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a special metallic coating that boosts the power of the holder's Steel-type moves.

holdItems.name: Miracle Seed
holdItems.desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a seed imbued with life force that boosts the power of the holder's Grass-type moves.

holdItems.name: Mystic Water
holdItems.desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This teardrop-shaped gem boosts the power of the holder's Water-type moves.

holdItems.name: Never-Melt Ice
holdItems.desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a heat-repelling piece of ice that boosts the power of the holder's Ice- type moves.

holdItems.name: Poison Barb
holdItems.desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This small poisonous barb boosts the power of the holder's Poison-type moves.

holdItems.name: Quick Claw
holdItems.desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This light, sharp claw lets the holder occasionally unleash a move faster than it usually would.

holdItems.name: Scope Lens
holdItems.desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a lens for scoping out weak points. It boosts the holder's critical-hit ratio.

holdItems.name: Sharp Beak
holdItems.desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a long, sharp beak that boosts the power of the holder's Flying-type moves.

holdItems.name: Shell Bell
holdItems.desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. The holder restores a little HP to itself every time it inflicts damage with an attack.

holdItems.name: Silk Scarf
holdItems.desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a sumptuous scarf that boosts the power of the holder's Normal-type moves.

holdItems.name: Silver Powder
holdItems.desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a shiny silver powder that boosts the power of the holder's Bug-type moves.

holdItems.name: Soft Sand
holdItems.desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This loose, silky sand boosts the power of the holder's Ground-type moves.

holdItems.name: Spell Tag
holdItems.desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It's a sinister, eerie tag that boosts the power of the holder's Ghost-type moves.

holdItems.name: Twisted Spoon
holdItems.desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This spoon is imbued with telekinetic energy and boosts the power of the holder's Psychic-type moves.

holdItems.name: White Herb
holdItems.desc: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It will restore any lowered stat in battle—but only once.

berries.name: Aspear Berry
berries.desc: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to thaw itself after being frozen.

berries.name: Babiri Berry
berries.desc: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Steel-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

berries.name: Charti Berry
berries.desc: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Rock-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

berries.name: Cheri Berry
berries.desc: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to free itself from paralysis.

berries.name: Chesto Berry
berries.desc: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to shake off its drowsiness.

berries.name: Chilan Berry
berries.desc: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a Normal-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

berries.name: Chople Berry
berries.desc: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Fighting-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

berries.name: Coba Berry
berries.desc: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Flying-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

berries.name: Colbur Berry
berries.desc: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Dark-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

berries.name: Haban Berry
berries.desc: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Dragon-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

berries.name: Kasib Berry
berries.desc: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Ghost-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

berries.name: Kebia Berry
berries.desc: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Poison-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

berries.name: Leppa Berry
berries.desc: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to restore 10 PP to a move.

berries.name: Lum Berry
berries.desc: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to cure itself of any status condition it may have.

berries.name: Occa Berry
berries.desc: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Fire-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

berries.name: Oran Berry
berries.desc: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to restore 10 HP to itself.

berries.name: Passho Berry
berries.desc: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Water-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

berries.name: Payapa Berry
berries.desc: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Psychic-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

berries.name: Pecha Berry
berries.desc: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to lift the effects of being poisoned from itself.

berries.name: Persim Berry
berries.desc: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to cure itself of confusion.

berries.name: Rawst Berry
berries.desc: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to cure itself of a burn.

berries.name: Rindo Berry
berries.desc: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Grass-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

berries.name: Roseli Berry
berries.desc: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Fairy-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

berries.name: Shuca Berry
berries.desc: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Ground-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

berries.name: Sitrus Berry
berries.desc: If a Pokémon holds one of these Berries, it will be able to restore a small amount of HP to itself.

berries.name: Tanga Berry
berries.desc: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Bug-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

berries.name: Wacan Berry
berries.desc: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Electric-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.

berries.name: Yache Berry
berries.desc: If a Pokémon holding this Berry is hit with a supereffective Ice-type move, the power of that move will be weakened.
